title: Beef Croquettes with Crispy Italian Breading
description: A classic Italian-inspired snack made with beef croquettes coated in a crispy breading. Serve with a side of marinara sauce for dipping.

ingredients.name: Beef Croquettes
ingredients.notes: Available at most grocery stores or Italian markets

instructions: In a shallow dish, beat the eggs.
In a separate dish, mix together the flour, breadcrumbs, and parmesan cheese.
Dip each beef croquette into the eggs, coating completely.
Roll the egg-coated croquette in the breadcrumb mixture to coat.
Place the coated croquette on a plate or tray.
Repeat the egg and breadcrumb coating process with the remaining croquettes.
Heat about 1/2 inch of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few of the coated croquettes to the skillet.
Fry the croquettes until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Remove the croquettes from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the crispy beef croquettes hot with your favorite marinara sauce for dipping.
